title: T-071 — sensory_panels + sensory_attribute_scores + sensory_panelist_comments tables (NPD-h)
prompt:
# T-071 — Sensory schema

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.4
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create sensory tables for the Sensory stage screen: sensory_panels (per-FA panel session), sensory_attribute_scores (per-attribute mean across panelists, configurable attributes), sensory_panelist_comments (free-text). V08 mean overall ≥ 7.0 enforced in compute layer (T-073-style action), schema only.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration packages/db/migrations/0071_sensory.sql creates sensory_panels (id PK, tenant_id, product_code FK fa, formulation_version_id FK, panel_date, mean_overall NUMERIC), sensory_attribute_scores (id PK, panel_id ON DELETE CASCADE, attribute_code TEXT (texture/aroma/flavor/appearance/mouthfeel default), mean_score NUMERIC CHECK between 1 and 10), sensory_panelist_comments (id PK, panel_id ON DELETE CASCADE, panelist_user_id, comment_text).
2. RLS + indexes (tenant_id, product_code).
3. Drizzle schemas + barrel.
4. NOTE: §17.11.4 D4 decision is pending downstream — schema implements full BUILD path; reduction to single FA cell is a separate downstream decision and out of scope here.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0071_sensory.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/sensory.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/sensory.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0071 runs, when \d sensory_attribute_scores runs, then it lists mean_score CHECK BETWEEN 1 AND 10 per §17.11.4 1–10 scale
2. Given a sensory_panels row is deleted, when DELETE runs, then matching sensory_attribute_scores + sensory_panelist_comments rows are CASCADE-deleted
3. Given two tenants seeded, when tenant A SELECT * FROM sensory_panels runs, then it returns only tenant A rows (RLS verified)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/sensory.test.ts asserting CHECK + cascade + RLS before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test sensory'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow mean_score outside 1-10
- Do not omit ON DELETE CASCADE on child tables
- Do not skip RLS
